Empowering your workspace with technology that connects people and builds meaningful connections.

Leadership

Nanda Najmi

Managing Director and Founder, Ease Your Needs

With a strong foundation in strategic growth and business management, Nanda Najmi brings deep expertise in delivering robust IT systems integration and creative digital services. Since founding Ease Your Needs (EYN) in 2020, she is dedicated to creating customized, technology-enabled workspaces that drive seamless collaboration and operational performance for modern businesses.

Leadership

Agil Purnomo

IT Head, Ease Your Needs

Agil Purnomo leads the technical backbone of Ease Your Needs as IT Head, bringing over 20 years of hands-on experience across the IT industry and broadcast media, including roles at MNCTV and MNC Media Group. His background spans the full spectrum of information technology, from infrastructure and systems integration to broadcast-grade technical operations.

As an all-round IT solutions expert, Agil bridges the gap between enterprise-grade technology and practical, on-the-ground implementation. His extensive media industry experience gives him a deep understanding of how mission-critical systems need to perform under real-world pressure, a perspective he brings directly into every client deployment at EYN.

Our History

Ease Your Needs (EYN) was founded in 2020 with a simple goal: to make technology work harder, so people don't have to. What started as a small team solving everyday workplace technology gaps grew into a dedicated IT consulting and system integration practice serving enterprises, government institutions, healthcare providers, and educational organizations across Indonesia.

Under the leadership of Nanda Najmi, EYN built its foundation around Unified Communication, Smart Room Integration, and Hybrid Event Broadcasting — three pillars that reflect how modern organizations actually work today: distributed, hybrid, and always connected. By partnering with trusted global technology brands such as Zoom, Google Workspace, Neat, DTEN, Jabra, and AthenaSpace, EYN has been able to deliver enterprise-grade solutions tailored to each client's space, scale, and workflow.

What sets EYN apart is not just the hardware or software it deploys, but the way it designs workspaces around people. Every integration is approached as a collaboration problem first and a technology problem second — ensuring that meeting rooms, hybrid events, and communication systems genuinely make teams more connected, not more complicated.

Today, EYN continues to grow as a trusted technology partner for organizations navigating the shift toward hybrid collaboration, combining technical depth with a hands-on, consultative approach in every project — from strategy and design to deployment and long-term support.

Empowering hybrid collaboration through intelligent integration. PT Ease Digital Kreatif — Jakarta, Indonesia.
